pg139-p1-s2: There was nothing to do but wait.
pg139-p1: brother-executive suffered from a serious illness. There was nothing to do but wait.
pg139-p2-s1: Presently the man did slip and was fired.
pg139-p2-s2: Following his discharge, we contacted him.
pg139-p2-s3:
Without much ado, he accepted the
principles and procedure that had helped us.
pg139-p2-s4: He is undoubtedly on the road to recovery.
pg139-p2-s5:
To me, this incident illustrates
lack of understanding as to what really ails the alcoholic, and lack of knowledge as to what part employers might
profitably take in salvaging their sick employees.
pg139-p2:
Presently the man did slip and was fired. Following his discharge, we contacted him. Without much ado, he accepted the
principles and procedure that had helped us. He is undoubtedly on the road to recovery. To me, this incident illustrates
lack of understanding as to what really ails the alcoholic, and lack of knowledge as to what part employers might
profitably take in salvaging their sick employees.
pg139-p3-s1: If you desire to help it might be well to disregard your own drinking, or lack of it.
pg139-p3-s2:
Whether you are a hard drinker, a
moderate drinker or a teetotaler, you may have some pretty strong opinions, perhaps prejudices.
pg139-p3-s3:
Those who drink
moderately may be more annoyed with an alcoholic than a total abstainer would be.
pg139-p3-s4:
Drinking occasionally, and
understanding your own reactions, it is possible for you to become quite sure of many things which, so far as the
alcoholic is concerned, are not always so.
pg139-p3-s5: As a moderate drinker, you can take your liquor or leave it alone.
pg139-p3-s6:
Whenever
you want to, you control your drinking.
pg139-p3-s7:
Of an evening, you can go on a mild bender, get up in the morning, shake your
head and go to business.
pg139-p3-s8: To you, liquor is no real problem.
pg139-p3-s9:
You cannot see why it should be to anyone else, save the
spineless and stupid.
pg139-p3:
If you desire to help it might be well to disregard your own drinking, or lack of it. Whether you are a hard drinker, a
moderate drinker or a teetotaler, you may have some pretty strong opinions, perhaps prejudices. Those who drink
moderately may be more annoyed with an alcoholic than a total abstainer would be. Drinking occasionally, and
understanding your own reactions, it is possible for you to become quite sure of many things which, so far as the
alcoholic is concerned, are not always so. As a moderate drinker, you can take your liquor or leave it alone. Whenever
you want to, you control your drinking. Of an evening, you can go on a mild bender, get up in the morning, shake your
head and go to business. To you, liquor is no real problem. You cannot see why it should be to anyone else, save the
spineless and stupid.
pg139-p4-s1: When dealing with an alcoholic, there may be a natural annoyance that a man could be so weak, stupid and irresponsible.
pg139-p4-s2: Even when you understand the malady better, you may feel this feeling rising.
pg139-p4: When dealing with an alcoholic, there may be a natural annoyance that a man could be so weak, stupid and irresponsible. Even when you understand the malady better, you may feel this feeling rising.
pg139-p5-s1: A look at the alcoholic in your organization is many times illuminating.
pg139-p5-s2:
Is he not usually brilliant, fast-thinking,
imaginative and likeable?
pg139-p5:
